Documentation

Get started

Installation Guide Install DeepPhe and understand how the installer lays out the local XN and Visualizer pieces.

Use DeepPhe

DeepPhe Desktop GUI Guide Launch local projects, select corpora and demographics, run the NLP summarizer, and open the cohort visualizer. DeepPhe Visualizer User Guide Explore cohorts and patient-level cancer phenotype results in the web Visualizer.

Build & integrate

DeepPhe Data API Use the API documentation for programmatic access to DeepPhe result data. DeepPhe DB Pipeline Load, transform, and query DeepPhe output through the database pipeline stages.
